title: opt_expr to trim A port of $shiftx/$shift

features.name: shiftx cell with unknown bit in A port
features.description: Code should include a $shiftx cell with A port containing 1'bx (unknown bit) in the most significant bit position
features.snippet:
cell $shiftx \shiftx
  parameter signed \Y_WIDTH 1
  parameter signed \A_WIDTH 4
  connect \A { 1'bx \a }
end
